criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No numeric weight stated in any topic-level source document (procedure field in slice source is empty). The call scope places strong emphasis on methodological rigour: mandatory KPIs, benchmarking, progress monitoring, and structured planning and reasoning mechanisms — all of which feed directly into Excellence sub-criteria assessment.
criteria.assumption_note: Criterion presence and standard weight distribution for RIA (typically Excellence 50%, Impact 30%, Quality 20%) are not stated in the topic-level call extract or slice. Criterion included as Assumed based on standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation structure. Numeric weights must be verified against Tier 2A instrument evaluation form templates and Tier 1 General Annexes before downstream use.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No numeric weight stated in topic-level source documents. The call text strongly foregrounds impact-related requirements: mandatory Apply AI Strategy contribution, ADRA partnership cohesion activities, deployment via EDIHs, AI-on-demand platform dissemination, and sector-specific portfolio award criteria — all indicating that Impact narrative is a high-priority evaluation dimension for this topic.
criteria.assumption_note: Criterion presence is Assumed from standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation structure; not explicitly stated in topic-level source documents. Numeric weights must be verified against Tier 2A evaluation form templates and Tier 1 General Annexes.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No numeric weight stated in topic-level source documents. Relevant call-specific implementation requirements include cohesion activity task allocation for ADRA and GenAI4EU Hub, AI Factories and Data Labs linkage, and validation in Testing and Experiment Facilities.
criteria.assumption_note: Criterion presence is Assumed from standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation structure; not explicitly stated in topic-level source documents. Numeric weights must be verified against Tier 2A evaluation form templates and Tier 1 General Annexes.

criteria.priority_notes: To ensure portfolio coverage, grants will be awarded to applications not only in order of ranking, but also to at least one proposal focusing on each of the three sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving, subject to proposals passing all evaluation thresholds. This is an explicit procedure exception that supplements the standard ranking-based award logic.
